sql_array: CREATE TABLE example_table (id UUID DEFAULT serverUUID(), name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE example_table SET name = 'Jane Doe' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM example_table LIMIT 1);
SELECT id, name FROM example_table WHERE id = serverUUID();
SELECT serverUUID() AS server_id, COUNT(*) FROM example_table GROUP BY server_id;
